testcase.name: test_list_topics_seeded

failure.message: AssertionError: missing last_touched_at on topic Linear Algebra assert 'last_touched_at' in {'domain': 'Mathematics', 'id': 'b8620e6f-6f0c-4273-9c47-d1a379fa5f28', 'mastery': 72, 'name': 'Linear Algebra', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py:101: in test_list_topics_seeded assert "last_touched_at" in t, f"missing last_touched_at on topic {t['name']}" E AssertionError: missing last_touched_at on topic Linear Algebra E assert 'last_touched_at' in {'domain': 'Mathematics', 'id': 'b8620e6f-6f0c-4273-9c47-d1a379fa5f28', 'mastery': 72, 'name': 'Linear Algebra', ...}

testcase.name: test_start_session_updates_last_touched_at
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py:107: in test_start_session_updates_last_touched_at topic = state["topics"][2] # use a fresh topic not used elsewhere ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'topics'

testcase.name: test_start_session
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py:136: in test_start_session topic = state["topics"][0] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'topics'

testcase.name: test_update_struggle
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py:163: in test_update_struggle sid = state["session"]["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'session'

testcase.name: test_struggle_bounds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py:174: in test_struggle_bounds sid = state["session"]["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'session'

testcase.name: test_end_session_applies_mastery
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py:185: in test_end_session_applies_mastery sid = state["session"]["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'session'

testcase.name: test_list_sessions_sorted_desc
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py:232: in test_list_sessions_sorted_desc assert len(sessions) >= 2 E AssertionError: assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len([{'duration_minutes': 10, 'ended_at': '2026-04-25T08:39:08.694873+00:00', 'id': 'dddb8b13-6759-49fc-82a7-5361e321ee89', 'mastery_delta': 20, ...}])

testcase.name: test_chat_send_and_history
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_studyos_api.py:241: in test_chat_send_and_history topic = state["topics"][1] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'topics'
